info.title: A fatal error was encountered. The library 'libhostpolicy.so' required to execute the application was not found in '/usr/share/dotnet'.
info.description:
Failed to run as a self-contained app.
- The application was run as a self-contained app because '/tmp/inspectra-help-virtualcentral-1.0.0-58f6aab67b634250beb088411aa71e5e/tool/.store/virtualcentral/1.0.0/virtualcentral/1.0.0/tools/net6.0/any/VirtualCentral.runtimeconfig.json' was not found.
- If this should be a framework-dependent app, add the '/tmp/inspectra-help-virtualcentral-1.0.0-58f6aab67b634250beb088411aa71e5e/tool/.store/virtualcentral/1.0.0/virtualcentral/1.0.0/tools/net6.0/any/VirtualCentral.runtimeconfig.json' file and specify the appropriate framework.
